title: Summary: Turn 57
content: Pueblo is a TypeScript/Node.js CLI+Desktop code agent with layered architecture (CLI, Command, Agent, Provider, Tool, Persistence, Desktop, Shared). Key decisions: dual-mode entry (CLI handoffs to Electron if enabled), ProviderRegistry abstraction (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek), slash-command routing via InputRouter vs agent tasks, Pepe memory/semantic search subsystem, and local SQLite persistence with Windows Credential Manager or file-based credential store.
